endpoints.name: List Areas by Criteria.
endpoints.description: Search for areas (locations of rental objects) by criteria.

endpoints.name: Get area by UID.
endpoints.description: Search for a specific area by UID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{AREAUID}} with a real areauid.

endpoints.name: Query for available RentalObjects of a specific view
endpoints.description: Here you can query all bookable Rental Objects with different Parameters (Time, Location,...)

endpoints.name: Lists all categories
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROVIDERNETWORKUID}} with a real providernetworkuid.

endpoints.name: Get a Category by UID
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROVIDERNETWORKUID}} with a real providernetworkuid. Replace {{CATEGORYUID}} with a real categoryuid.

endpoints.name: Get information about the prices.
endpoints.description: Prices of a rental object by query params. The params depend on the price determination strategy of the provider network.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROVIDERNETWORKUID}} with a real providernetworkuid.

endpoints.name: Get information about the RentalObject.
endpoints.description: Get information about the Rental Object.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{RENTALOBJECTUID}} with a real rentalobjectuid. Replace {{PROVIDERNETWORKUID}} with a real providernetworkuid.

endpoints.name: Get information about the ProviderNetworkResources.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{UID}} with a real uid.

endpoints.name: Get information about the ProviderResourceImpl.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{UID}} with a real uid.
